title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at UltraTech Cement are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!
